title: Casualty tag without medical diagnosis
summary: A simple tag that travels with a casualty when clinics, ambulances, or relatives are separated.
content: A casualty tag is not a diagnosis. It is a memory tool: name or description, age estimate, contact, allergies, medicines, known conditions, event time, red flags, actions taken, and last check. In collapse, a tag can prevent repeated mistakes and help the next helper understand what changed.
materials: clean water if available. Context: “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”.
soap or sanitizer. Context: “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”.
gloves or clean barrier. Context: “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”.
paper and pen. Context: “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”.
phone, radio, or messenger — for «Casualty tag without medical diagnosis»
labels for time and symptoms — for «Casualty tag without medical diagnosis»
steps: Use pencil or waterproof marker if possible.
Attach the tag to clothing or a bag, not directly to skin.
Update time whenever the person is rechecked or moved.
Keep private details covered from the public.
warnings: This is not medical advice and it is not a doctor's advice. It is offline emergency organization guidance only. Use local emergency numbers, trained first aid, pharmacists, clinics, doctors, poison centers, and official public-health instructions whenever available. Do not perform surgery, invasive procedures, diagnosis, prescription changes, or medicine dosing from this guide. Treat this as a specific boundary while managing “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”.

Escalate immediately for trouble breathing, heavy bleeding, unconsciousness, severe pain, chest pain, stroke signs, severe burns, pregnancy danger signs, infants in distress, poisoning, or rapid worsening. Treat this as a specific boundary while managing “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”.
Do not delay evacuation or professional care to finish a checklist. Treat this as a specific boundary while managing “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”.
Keep privacy, consent, dignity, and local law in mind even during collapse. Treat this as a specific boundary while managing “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”.
common_mistakes: Trying to diagnose instead of recognizing danger signs while carrying out “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”
Forgetting times, medicines, allergies, and changes while carrying out “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”
Touching fluids or wounds without hand hygiene while carrying out “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”
Moving an injured person without a safety reason while carrying out “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”
Letting panic, crowds, or rumors control care while carrying out “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”
alternatives: Use certified first-aid training where available as a fallback for “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”
Use official emergency services or the nearest clinic as a fallback for “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”
Use a pharmacist for medicine questions as a fallback for “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”
Use radio/phone consultation if transport is delayed as a fallback for “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”
Use written handover notes when devices fail as a fallback for “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”
failure_signs: Breathing, bleeding, consciousness, pain, fever, confusion, weakness, or skin color gets worse during “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”
The helper cannot keep the scene clean or safe during “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”
Transport, water, power, or communication failure blocks care during “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”
The person becomes unable to drink, speak, walk, recognize people, or stay awake during “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis”
when_not_to_use: Do not use it to replace a doctor, ambulance, clinic, pharmacist, poison center, or trained first-aider when using the “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis” record
Do not use it for surgery or invasive treatment when using the “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis” record
Do not use it to change prescription medicines or doses when using the “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis” record
Do not force care on a conscious adult except immediate life-safety actions allowed by local rules when using the “Casualty tag without medical diagnosis” record
short_term: Reduce immediate danger, call or send for qualified help, keep the person clean, warm or cool as needed, and record facts without guessing. This note applies specifically to Casualty tag without medical diagnosis.
long_term: Build certified first-aid capacity, update medical records, protect supplies, practice handovers, and map routes to pharmacies, clinics, hospitals, and shelters. This note applies specifically to Casualty tag without medical diagnosis.
if_method_fails: Escalate by the fastest safe route: emergency number, clinic, hospital, pharmacist, poison center, radio medical consult, trained first-aider, or evacuation convoy. Record what failed and when. This note applies specifically to Casualty tag without medical diagnosis.
environment_notes: In apartments, shelters, rubble zones, heatwaves, floods, smoke, and outages, medical problems worsen because of crowding, poor air, poor hygiene, no elevator, no refrigeration, and delayed transport. This note applies specifically to Casualty tag without medical diagnosis.
